description: Joint Commission EC.02.05.07: Operating rooms must demonstrate backup power capability for all life-safety electrical systems within 10 seconds of normal power failure.
Joint Commission EC.02.05.07: ICU patient care areas must have generator-backed emergency power for all critical patient monitoring and life-support equipment.
Joint Commission IC.02.02.01: Sterile processing must demonstrate physical separation between decontamination, assembly, and sterile storage areas.
Joint Commission IC.02.02.01: Operating suites must demonstrate continuous HVAC monitoring with documented ACH compliance records.
Joint Commission IC.02.01.01: Airborne infection isolation rooms must have documented negative pressure monitoring with visual indicator at each entrance.
Joint Commission LS.02.01.30: All corridors and common areas must be free of storage that reduces the minimum egress width below 8 feet in patient care areas.
Joint Commission LS.02.01.20: Each patient room must have a documented egress path with a minimum 3-foot clear doorway and unobstructed path to the corridor.
Joint Commission PC.02.01.19: ICU patient visibility from the nurse station is required; each ICU bed must be directly observable or have electronic monitoring from the central station.
Joint Commission PC.02.01.19: Medication preparation areas (medication rooms) must be located within or immediately adjacent to the nurse station.
Joint Commission RI.01.01.01: Patient waiting areas must provide adequate space to maintain patient privacy during registration and check-in processes.
Joint Commission MM.01.01.03: Pharmacy must have secured, locked medication storage separate from general storage areas with access restricted to authorized personnel.
Joint Commission EC.02.06.01: Clinical laboratory areas must meet OSHA Bloodborne Pathogen Standard requirements for sharps disposal and biohazard containment.
Joint Commission EC.02.06.01: Nurse stations and clinical work areas must provide hand hygiene facilities (sink or alcohol-based rub) within the immediate work zone.
